decisions.title: OpenAI收购个人理财AI创业公司Hiro，ChatGPT开始布局金融场景

decisions.title: OpenAI高管内部备忘录指控Anthropic虚增80亿美元营收
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-08, 04-11, 04-13, 04-14 covering Anthropic's $30B ARR milestone. New info: leaked OpenAI CRO Denise Dresser memo on 04-13 accusing Anthropic of $8B run-rate inflation through gross cloud accounting, reducing Anthropic's real ARR to ~$22B vs OpenAI's $25B. Also reveals Ramp data shows Anthropic on track to pass OpenAI in enterprise share within 2 months.

decisions.title: Vercel CEO暗示IPO就绪：30%应用由AI Agent生成
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-08 covering $300M funding at $9.3B valuation. New info: CEO Rauch signals IPO readiness on 04-13, reveals 30% of Vercel apps now generated by AI agents, ARR reached $340M. IPO market frozen for most companies due to AI-driven software selloff.
